data.title: Coastal Mississippi Announces Lineup of Events and Experiences in Celebration of America250
data.description: Travelers have the opportunity to celebrate America's 250th anniversary by partaking in coastal traditions, exploring historic sites, and attending commemorative events in Coastal Mississippi. The announcement was made in Biloxi, Mississippi on April 30, 2026. The region is excited to showcase a variety of activities and attractions as part of the nation's anniversary celebration.

data.title: ATTOM ANALYSIS FINDS SPRING REMAINS THE PRIME WINDOW FOR HOME SELLERS
data.description: A recent study conducted in March revealed that home sellers experienced a premium of 10.7 percent. The annual analysis conducted by ATTOM, a prominent provider of property data and real estate intelligence solutions, also examined the most favorable days for selling a home. The study, which took place in Irvine, California, provided insights into the current real estate market trends.

data.title: Hagar hf.: Annual General Meeting of Hagar hf. – 21 May 2026
data.description: Hagar hf., with registration number 670203-2120, will conduct its Annual General Meeting on Thursday, May 21, 2026, commencing at 3:00 PM. The meeting will take place at Hilton Reykjavík Nordica, specifically at the Vox Club located at Suðurlandsbraut 2 in Reykjavík.

data.title: Klaviyo Brings Custom AI Skills to Customer Agent, Built on its CRM
data.description: Klaviyo, a leading autonomous B2C CRM, has introduced Custom Skills for Customer Agent, marking a significant upgrade that enables brands to enhance their AI agent beyond standard functions. With this update, businesses now have the opportunity to create personalized customer experiences using the existing CRM platform that also supports their marketing efforts. The Customer Agent feature currently manages order tracking, returns, and product suggestions. Through Custom Skills, companies can now define unique functionalities and tailor their customer interactions.
Labcorp Advances As AI Investments, Core Businesses Drive Growth

data.title: Lens Introduces Platform that Governs AI Agents Running Anywhere
data.description: Lens by Mirantis, based in Campbell, California, has introduced Lens Agents, a controlled platform designed for deploying AI agents within enterprise systems. This new platform allows organizations to efficiently run, secure, and expand AI agents across desktop and cloud environments in a unified and policy-driven manner. Lens Agents, currently in early access, facilitates the integration of various AI agents such as desktop tools like Claude, Cursor, and Copilot, external autonomous agents utilizing any framework, and platform agents.

data.title: AUA and OpenEvidence Collaborate to Expand Access to Evidence-Based Urologic Clinical Practice Guidelines
data.description: A partnership between the American Urological Association (AUA) and OpenEvidence, an AI-powered clinical decision support platform, has been launched in Miami and Baltimore. The collaboration will bring AUA Clinical Practice Guidelines and Clinical Consensus Statements to the OpenEvidence platform over multiple years. This initiative is aimed at providing clinicians with access to evidence-based guidance during patient care. OpenEvidence offers physicians comprehensive information to aid in making informed decisions. This collaboration will significantly enhance the dissemination of AUA guidelines to clinicians in practice.

data.title: PsiQuantum Appoints Lip-Bu Tan to Board of Directors
data.description: PsiQuantum, a company based in Palo Alto, California, recently revealed that Lip-Bu Tan, the current CEO of Intel and a prominent figure in the semiconductor sector, has been appointed to their Board of Directors. This move signifies a significant development for PsiQuantum as they continue to expand their leadership team. Tan's vast experience in the industry is expected to bring valuable insights to the company's operations.

data.title: WRITER Launches Event-Based Triggers for Enterprise AI Agents, Extending Automation Across Systems Without Human Initiation
data.description: In a recent announcement in San Francisco, WRITER, a highly regarded enterprise AI agent platform utilized by Fortune 500 companies worldwide, introduced event-based triggers for its WRITER Agent. This development allows businesses to automate intricate workflows throughout their technology systems without the need for manual initiation. The update also includes additional enterprise connectors, with notable additions such as Adobe Experience Manager, as well as improved governance controls. These enhancements solidify WRITER's position as the premier platform for autonomous enterprise operations on a large scale.

data.title: Mortgage Rates Average 6.30%
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in McLean, Virginia, Freddie Mac shared findings from its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ). The survey revealed that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.30%.

data.title: ‘King of the Hill’-Themed WD-40® Multi-Use Product to be Introduced at The Home Depot
data.description: In San Diego, WD-40® Brand has announced a partnership with Disney Entertainment to release a special limited-edition can inspired by "King of the Hill." This collaboration aims to celebrate the iconic show by offering fans a unique collectible item.

data.title: Exiger Taps Enterprise AI Executive Adi Kavaler as CTO to Accelerate AI Innovation
data.description: A seasoned professional, who served as CTO at CentralSquare Technologies and Zilliant, has recently joined Exiger, a prominent supply chain AI company based in Washington. Exiger is known for its innovative solutions and is the primary supplier of supply chain technology to the U.S. Government. The announcement was made on April 30, 2026, marking a significant addition to Exiger's team.

data.title: Stitzel-Weller Distillery Unveils Stitzel Reserve 31-Year-Old Bourbon Whiskey
data.description: Presenting the newest offering from Stitzel Reserve is a unique 31-year-old bourbon crafted in 1992, boasting a potent 163.2 proof. This exclusive spirit will hit shelves solely at Stitzel-Weller Distillery starting on April 30, 2026. Hailing from Louisville, Ky., the establishment announced this special release today, marking a significant event for spirits enthusiasts worldwide.

data.title: Providence Holy Cross Medical Center earns Magnet with Distinction recognition, highest honor for nursing excellence
data.description: For the fifth year in a row, Providence Holy Cross Medical Center in Mission Hills, California has received the esteemed Magnet® with Distinction recognition, showcasing their continued excellence in nursing practice. This designation marks a significant achievement, highlighting the medical center's leadership in providing exceptional nursing care. The recognition was awarded on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Reverence Capital Partners Closes More Than $2 Billion Recapitalization of Osaic
data.description: A recent transaction has brought liquidity to current fund investors while also securing a new institutional capital base to aid in the ongoing expansion of Osaic. Ares, Lexington Partners, and Bain Capital have invested in a prominent wealth management business, alongside additional support from Reverence Capital Partners. This move ensures financial backing for future growth and reinforces the company's position in the market.
